_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Both brains agree the current setup mirrors a bottom-accumulation regime that should transition upward into Hope, but the analyst's poor transition track record and live factor divergences demand humility until confirmation arrives.
next_move.brains_agree: Yes — both point to an UP transition into Hope, though they split on conviction (analyst low, narrative high).
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed rises above 30 with btc_momentum_30d holding above 50 and funding cooling below 0.006%
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed drops below 20 or vix spikes above 25 with funding rising above 0.012%
